title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Device Home screen connection status updates correctly between 'Connected' (green) and 'Disconnected' (red) when Poly headset is powered on/off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Ensure a Poly headset is paired and powered ON.
4. Observe the connection status displayed on the Home screen for the paired device.
5. Note the status text and marker color (expected: 'Connected' with a green marker).
6. Turn OFF the paired Poly headset.
7. Observe the connection status displayed on the Home screen for the paired device.
8. Note the status text and marker color (expected: 'Disconnected' with a red marker).
expected: When the headset is connected, the Home screen shows 'Connected' with a green marker. When the headset is turned off, the status updates to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
